title: The Force Unleashed (Star Wars Miniatures)
content:
{{Top|rwm|imp|italics=1|italics2=1}} {{ExpansionPack |image=[[File:FUMiniatures.jpg]] |title=''The Force Unleashed'' |game=''[[Star Wars Miniatures]]'' |publisher=[[Wizards of the Coast]] |release date=[[November 16]], [[2007]][[Star Wars Insider 97|''Star Wars Insider'' 97]] |figures= |cards= |isbn= |upc= |timeline= |preceded by= |followed by= }} [[File:TFU_minis.jpg|thumb|''The Force Unleashed'' set poster]] '''''The Force Unleashed''''' is a [[Star Wars Miniatures]] set that was released on [[November 16]], [[2007]] covering the ''[[Star Wars: The Force Unleashed]]'' multimedia project. It consisted of sixty figures, all boosters, including fifteen game characters and ten huge figures. ==Contents== {{Mediacat|from=1|imagecat=Images from The Force Unleashed (Star Wars Miniatures)}} Rarity denoted as follows: Common (C), Uncommon (U), Rare (R), Very Rare (VR) '''SITH'''
  1. [[Darth/Legends|Darth]] [[Revan/Legends|Revan]] (VR)
'''REPUBLIC'''
  1. [[Kazdan Paratus]] (R)
  2. [[Shaak Ti/Legends|Shaak Ti]], [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] (VR)
'''REBEL'''
  1. [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]] of [[Hoth/Legends|Hoth]] (VR)
  2. Elite [[Hoth/Legends|Hoth]] Trooper (C) [Reprint from Rebel Storm]
  3. [[DF.9/Legends|Golan Arms DF.9 Anti-Infantry Battery]] (UC)
  4. [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] in [[Carbonite/Legends|Carbonite]] (VR)
  5. Han Solo of Hoth (VR)
  6. Hoth Trooper Officer (UC)
  7. Hoth Trooper with [[Repeating blaster cannon/Legends|Repeating Blaster Cannon]] (UC)
  8. [[Juno Eclipse/Legends|Juno Eclipse]] (R)
  9. [[K-3PO/Legends|K-3PO]] (R)
  10. [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], Hoth Pilot Unleashed (R)
  11. Luke Skywalker and [[Yoda/Legends|Yoda]] (VR)
  12. Luke's Snowspeeder (VR)
  13. Master [[Rahm Kota/Legends|Kota]] (R)
  14. [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]] [[Medic/Legends|Medic]] (C)
  15. [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]], Unleashed (R)
  16. Princess [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia]] of [[Cloud City/Legends|Cloud City]] (R)
  17. [[Rebel Marksman/Legends|Rebel Marksman]] (UC)
  18. [[Rebel personnel carrier/Legends|Rebel Troop Cart]] (UC)
  19. Rebel Trooper on [[Tauntaun/Legends|Tauntaun]] (R)
  20. [[Rebel Vanguard/Legends|Rebel Vanguard]] (UC)
  21. [[2-1B/Legends|2-1B]] (R)
  22. [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Vader's]] [[Galen Marek|Secret Apprentice]], Redeemed (R)
  23. [[Verpine/Legends|Verpine]] Tech (Rebel) (C)
  24. [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]], Red Two (Rebel) (R)
  25. [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] Warrior (Rebel) (C)
'''IMPERIAL'''
  1. Admiral [[Kendal Ozzel/Legends|Ozzel]] (R)
  2. [[Vehicle Command Crewer|AT-AT Driver]] (UC)
  3. [[Dark Trooper/Legends|Dark trooper]] (UC)
  4. [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]], Unleashed (VR)
  5. [[Emperor's Shadow Guard]] (UC)
  6. [[EVO trooper|Evo Trooper]] (UC)
  7. [[Felucia/Legends|Felucian]] [[Stormtrooper/Legends|Stormtrooper Officer]] (UC)
  8. [[Gotal/Legends|Gotal]] Imperial Assassin (C)
  9. [[Imperial Navy Trooper/Legends|Imperial Navy trooper]] (C)
  10. [[Jumptrooper/Legends|Raxus Prime Trooper]] (C)
  11. [[Cold assault stormtrooper|Snowtrooper]] (C) [Reprint from Rebel Storm]
  12. [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] Officer (UC)
  13. [[Stormtrooper/Legends|Stormtrooper]] (UC) [Reprint from Rebel Strom]
  14. [[TIE crawler/Legends|TIE Crawler]] (UC)
  15. Vader's Apprentice, Unleashed (VR)
  16. Wookiee Hunter [[All Terrain Scout Transport/Legends|AT-ST]] (R)
'''NEW REPUBLIC'''
  1. [[Garm Bel Iblis/Legends|Garm Bel Iblis]] (R)
'''FRINGE'''
  1. [[Amani/Legends|Amanin]] Scout (UC)
  2. [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]], Mercenary (VR)
  3. [[Caamasi/Legends|Caamasi]] Noble (C)
  4. [[Storm IV Twin-Pod cloud car/Legends|Cloud Car]] Pilot (C)
  5. Felucian Warrior on [[Rancor/Legends|Rancor]] (VR)
  6. [[Junk golem]] (UC)
  7. [[Knobby white spider/Legends|Knobby white spider]] (UC)
  8. [[Maris Brood]] (VR)
  9. [[Muun/Legends|Muun]] Tactics Broker (C)
  10. [[Mynock/Legends|Mynock]] (UC)
  11. [[PROXY]] (R)
  12. [[Telos IV|Telosian]] Tank Droid (UC)
  13. [[Uggernaught]] (R)
  14. [[Ugnaught/Legends|Ugnaught]] Boss (UC)
  15. Ugnaught Tech (UC)
